title: Pop
description: A simple client-side mod that adds a satisfying audio cue when the game reaches the title screen. Inspired by Ding.
body:
A lightweight, client-side Minecraft mod that plays a satisfying “pop” sound once the game has fully finished loading and reaches the title screen. Designed as a small quality-of-life touch, it provides clear audio feedback that Minecraft is ready, inspired by the classic Ding mod. The mod also plays when loading into worlds and includes configurable options for boot sounds, world sounds, and custom sound file support. Combine with [Fadeless](https://modrinth.com/mod/fadeless) for a more accurate Pop... (without it the pop sounds early due to the fade animation)

Discord for support:
https://discord.gg/gCdgQkkmFt
